creator: troff@paranoia.ru
text:
Current ickle 0.1.2 port includes <getop.h> though getopt(3) 
	interface is prototyped in <unistd.h> and does not require
	<getopt.h>, which is not part of the FreeBSD base system.

Fix: Place this patch in files/



using namespace ICQ2000;
 using namespace std;--rp44bsXPXWFukpflTTLjZYy0TNt4TxPhBe7LnIC55nWrjrVE
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- examples/shell.cpp.orig     Mon Nov 26 14:30:42 2001
+++ examples/shell.cpp  Mon Nov 26 14:30:57 2001
@@ -11,7 +11,6 @@                               
 #include <sys/wait.h>                          
 #include <unistd.h>                          
 #include <signal.h>                          
-#include <getopt.h>
